{{Quote|I was told you could teach me to fly.|A spacer, to Serissu|<ref name="SWG:Fpm" />}}
'''Serissu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who worked as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] trainer for the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]].<ref name="SWG:Fpm" />

==Biography==
{{Quote|We're not sure what they are doing there but it doesn't matter, pirates are not welcome here! I need you to fly out there and chase off any Black Sun Pirates you find.|Serissu, to a Car'das pilot|<ref name="SWG:PfBS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Patrolling for Black Sun|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
Serissu was a well-trained pilot for the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], she was based on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]], along with [[Laetin A'shera]], [[Aleas Rans'ery]] and [[Dartas Pytin]]. Serissu served as pilot recruiter and trainer.<ref name="SWG:Fpm" />

[[File:Serissu_miniature.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Serissu in her M3-A Scyk fighter]]
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG timeline}}</ref> Serissu recruited several spacers to become pilots for Car'das. She provided them [[M3-A Scyk interceptor/Legends|M3-A Scyk fighters]] and taught them basic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] piloting skills. The new pilots performed successful missions, including a patrol near [[Station Gamma]],<ref name="SWG:Fpm" /> a dogfight against [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] around an abandoned space hulk,<ref name="SWG:PfBS" /> and an escort of a Car'das officer. The new pilots were finally assigned to fight in the [[Battle of Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Battle of Tansarii Point Station]] under the orders of Laetin A'shera.<ref name="SWG:E">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Escorting|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Serissu appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:Fpm" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Serissu was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:Fpm" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[w:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>

Serrisu gave the player an M3-A Scyk fighter to use during the piloting tutorials. She gave players the first quests involving space flight, including basic things as piloting, docking, contacting space stations, fighting enemy ships and escorting friendly ships.<ref name="SWG:Fpm" /><ref name="SWG:PfBS" /> After completing her missions, players could talk to Laetin A'shera to get more difficult space missions.<ref name="SWG:E" />
